mapper.select:
SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.phone, f.address, f.founder_name, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code, f.create_time, pf.name AS parent_name, (CASE WHEN f.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} THEN '族长' ELSE (SELECT m.role FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = f.id AND m.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND m.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) END) AS myRole FROM family f LEFT JOIN family pf ON pf.id = f.pid AND pf.del_flag = 0
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND (f.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0))
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id DESC

SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f
AND (f.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0))
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id ASC

choose.when: SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.id ASC
choose.otherwise: WITH RECURSIVE my_families AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE (founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0)) AND del_flag = 0 ), walk_up AS ( SELECT id, pid FROM family WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM my_families) UNION SELECT f.id, f.pid FROM family f INNER JOIN walk_up w ON f.id = w.pid WHERE f.del_flag = 0 AND w.pid > 0 ), roots AS ( SELECT id FROM walk_up WHERE pid = 0 OR pid IS NULL ), walk_down AS ( SELECT id, pid FROM family WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM roots) AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, f.pid FROM family f INNER JOIN walk_down w ON f.pid = w.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT DISTINCT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f WHERE f.id IN (SELECT id FROM walk_down) AND f.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.id ASC
